EForm.FDef: { "display": "form", "settings": {}, "components": [ { "label": "Datos personales del alumno", "type": "panel", "key": "panelPersonal", "input": false, "tableView": false, "collapsible": "columns", "key": "colsP1", "input": false, "tableView": false, "mask": false, "alwaysEnabled": false, "reorder": false, "properties": {}, "customConditional": "", "logic": [], "attributes": {}, "tableView": true, "label": "Column", "components": [ { "label": "Nombre", "allowMultipleMasks": false, "showWordCount": false, "showCharCount": false, "tableView": true, "alwaysEnabled": false, "input": false, "hideOnChildrenHidden": false, "key": "column2", "tableView": true, "label": "Column", "components": [ { "label": "Primer apellido", "allowMultipleMasks": false, "showWordCount": "" }, "columns": [ { "width": 4, "offset": 0, "push": 0, "pull": 0, "type": "column", "input": false, "hideOnChildrenHidden": false, "key": "column4", "tableView": true, "label": "Column", "components": [ { "label": "Fecha de nacimiento", "tableView": true, "alwaysEnabled": false, "type": "datetime", "input": true, "key": "fechaNacimiento", "enableDate": true, "enableTime": false, "format": "dd/MM/yyyy", "reorder": false, "properties": {}, "customConditional": "", "logic": [], "attributes": {}, "validate": { "required": true, "customMessage": "", "json": "" }, "conditional": { "show": "", "when": "", "json": "" } } ] }, { "width": 4, "offset": 0, "push": 0, "pull": 0, "type": "column", "input": false, "hideOnChildrenHidden": false, "key": "column5", "tableView": true, "input": true, "key": "dniNie", "inputFormat": "plain", "encrypted": false, "properties": {}, "customConditional": "", "logic": [], "attributes": {}, "reorder": false, "validate": { "required": false, "maxLength": 20, "customMessage": "", "json": "" }, "conditional": { "show": "", "when": "", "json": "" } } ] }, { "width": 4, "offset": 0, "push": 0, "pull": 0, "type": "column", "input": false, "hideOnChildrenHidden": false, "key": "column6", "tableView": true, "label": "Column", "components": [ { "label": "Numero de telefono del alumno", "allowMultipleMasks": false, "showWordCount": false, "showCharCount": false, "tableView": true, "alwaysEnabled": false, "type": "phoneNumber", "input": true, "key": "telefonoAlumno", "defaultValue": "", "inputFormat": "plain", "encrypted": false, "json": "" } } ] } ] } ] }, { "label": "Datos academicos", "type": "panel", "key": "panelAcademico", "input": false, "tableView": false, "collapsible": false, "reorder": false, "properties": {}, "customConditional": "", "logic": [], "attributes": {}, "conditional": { "show": "", "when": "", "json": "" }, "components": [ { "label": "Columnas", "type": "columns", "key": "colsA1", "input": false, "tableView": false, "mask": false, "alwaysEnabled": false, "reorder": false, "properties": {}, "customConditional": "", "logic": [], "attributes": {}, "conditional": { "show": "", "when": "", "json": "" }, "columns": [ { "width": 3, "offset": 0, "push": 0, "pull": 0, "type": "column", "input": false, "hideOnChildrenHidden": false, "key": "column7", "tableView": true, "label": "Column", "components": [ { "label": "Curso", "tableView": true, "alwaysEnabled": false, "type": "select", "input": true, "key": "curso", "reorder": false, "properties": {}, "customConditional": "", "logic": [], "attributes": {}, "validate": { "required": true, "customMessage": "", "json": "" }, "conditional": { "show": "", "when": "", "json": "" }, "data": { "values": [ { "label": "1 ESO", "value": "1ESO" }, { "label": "2 ESO", "value": "2ESO" }, { "label": "3 ESO", "value": "3ESO" }, { "label": "4 ESO", "value": "4ESO" }, { "label": "1 Bachillerato", "value": "1BACH" }, { "label": "2 Bachillerato", "value": "2BACH" } ] } } ] }, { "width": 3, "offset": 0, "push": 0, "pull": 0, "type": "column", "input": false, "hideOnChildrenHidden": false, "key": "column8", "tableView": true, "label": "Column", "components": [ { "label": "Grupo", "tableView": true, "alwaysEnabled": false, "type": "select", "input": true, "key": "grupo", "reorder": false, "properties": {}, "customConditional": "", "logic": [], "attributes": {}, "validate": { "required": true, "customMessage": "", "json": "" }, "conditional": { "show": "", "when": "", "json": "" }, "data": { "values": [ { "label": "A", "value": "A" }, { "label": "B", "value": "B" }, { "label": "C", "value": "C" }, { "label": "D", "value": "D" } ] } } ] }, { "width": 3, "offset": 0, "push": 0, "pull": 0, "type": "column", "input": false, "hideOnChildrenHidden": false, "key": "column9", "tableView": true, "label": "Column", "components": [ { "label": "Ano academico", "allowMultipleMasks": false, "showWordCount": false, "showCharCount": false, "tableView": true, "alwaysEnabled": false, "type": "textfield", "input": true, "key": "anyoAcademico", "defaultValue": "2025/2026", "inputFormat": "plain", "encrypted": false, "properties": {}, "customConditional": "", "logic": [], "attributes": {}, "reorder": false, "validate": { "required": true, "maxLength": 10, "customMessage": "", "json": "" }, "conditional": { "show": "", "when": "", "json": "" } } ] }, { "width": 3, "offset": 0, "push": 0, "pull": 0, "type": "column", "input": false, "hideOnChildrenHidden": false, "key": "column10", "tableView": true, "label": "Column", "components": [ { "label": "Estado matricula", "tableView": true, "alwaysEnabled": false, "type": "select", "input": true, "key": "estadoMatricula", "defaultValue": "ACTIVO", "reorder": false, "properties": {}, "customConditional": "", "logic": [], "attributes": {}, "validate": { "required": true, "customMessage": "", "json": "" }, "conditional": { "show": "", "when": "", "json": "" }, "data": { "values": [ { "label": "Matriculado activo", "value": "ACTIVO" }, { "label": "Pendiente documentacion", "value": "PENDIENTE" }, { "label": "Baja temporal", "value": "BAJA_TEMP" }, { "label": "Baja definitiva", "value": "BAJA_DEF" }, { "label": "Graduado", "value": "GRADUADO" } ] } } ] } ] }, { "label": "Columnas", "type": "columns", "key": "colsA2", "input": false, "tableView": false, "mask": false, "alwaysEnabled": false, "reorder": false, "properties": {}, "customConditional": "", "logic": [], "attributes": {}, "conditional": { "show": "", "when": "", "json": "" }, "columns": [ { "width": 6, "offset": 0, "push": 0, "pull": 0, "type": "column", "input": false, "hideOnChildrenHidden": false, "key": "column11", "tableView": true, "label": "Column", "components": [ { "label": "Tutor asignado", "allowMultipleMasks": false, "showWordCount": false, "showCharCount": false, "tableView": true, "alwaysEnabled": false, "type": "textfield", "input": true, "key": "tutorAsignado", "inputFormat": "plain", "encrypted": false, "properties": {}, "customConditional": "", "logic": [], "attributes": {}, "reorder": false, "validate": "properties": {}, "customConditional": "", "logic": [], "attributes": {}, "reorder": false, "validate": { "required": false, "maxLength": 150, "customMessage": "", "json": "" }, "conditional": { "show": "", "when": "", "json": "" } } ] } ] } ] }, { "label": "Contacto familiar", "type": "panel", "key": "panelFamiliar", "input": false, "tableView": false, "collapsible": false, "reorder": false, true, "label": "Column", "components": [ { "label": "Nombre del tutor legal", "allowMultipleMasks": false, "showWordCount": false, "showCharCount": false, "tableView": true, "alwaysEnabled": false, "type": "textfield", "input": true, "key": "tutorLegal", "inputFormat": "plain", "encrypted": false, "properties": {}, "customConditional": "", "logic": [], "attributes": {}, "reorder": false, "validate": { "required": true, "maxLength": 150, "customMessage": "", "json": "" }, "conditional": { "show": "", "when": "", "json": "" } } ] }, { "width": 6, "offset": 0, "push": 0, "pull": 0, "type": "column", "input": false, "hideOnChildrenHidden": false, "key": "column14", "tableView": true, "label": "Column", "components": [ { "label": "Relacion con el alumno", "tableView": true, "alwaysEnabled": false, "type": "select", "input": true, "key": "relacionAlumno", "reorder": false, "properties": {}, "customConditional": "", "logic": [], "attributes": {}, "validate": { "required": true, "customMessage": "", "json": "" }, "conditional": { "show": "", "when": "", "json": "" }, "data": { "values": [ { "label": "Padre o Madre", "value": "PADRE_MADRE" }, { "label": "Tutor legal", "value": "TUTOR_LEGAL" }, { "label": "Otro familiar", "value": "OTRO" } ] } } ] } ] }, { "label": "Columnas", "type": "columns", "key": "colsF2", "input": false, "tableView": false, "mask": false, "alwaysEnabled": false, "reorder": false, "properties": {}, "customConditional": "", "logic": [], "attributes": {}, "conditional": { "show": "", "when": "", "json": "" }, "columns": [ { "width": 6, "offset": 0, "push": 0, "pull": 0, "type": "column", "input": false, "hideOnChildrenHidden": false, "key": "column15", "tableView": true, "label": "Column", "components": [ { "label": "Telefono de contacto", "allowMultipleMasks": false, "showWordCount": false, "showCharCount": false, "tableView": true, "alwaysEnabled": false, "type": "phoneNumber", "input": true, "key": "telefono", "defaultValue": "", "inputFormat": "plain", "encrypted": false, "properties": {}, "customConditional": "", "logic": [], "attributes": {}, "reorder": false, "validate": { "required": true, "customMessage": "", "json": "" }, "conditional": { "show": "", "when": "", "json": "" } } ] }, { "width": 6, "offset": 0, "push": 0, "pull": 0, "type": "column", "input": false, "hideOnChildrenHidden": false, "key": "column16", "tableView": true, "label": "Column", "components": [ { "label": "Correo electronico familiar", "allowMultipleMasks": false, "showWordCount": false, "showCharCount": false, "tableView": true, "alwaysEnabled": false, "type": "email", "input": true, "key": "emailFamiliar", "inputFormat": "plain", "encrypted": false, "properties": {}, "customConditional": "", "logic": [], "attributes": {}, "reorder": false, "validate": { "required": false, "customMessage": "", "json": "" }, "conditional": { "show": "", "when": "", "json": "" } } ] } ] } ] }, { "label": "Consentimiento", "type": "panel", "key": "panelConsentimiento", "input": false, "tableView": false, "collapsible": false, "reorder": false, "properties": {}, "customConditional": "", "logic": [], "attributes": {}, "conditional": { "show": "", "when": "", "json": "" }, "components": [ { "label": "Acepto el tratamiento de datos personales segun la politica de privacidad del centro", "tableView": true, "alwaysEnabled": false, "type": "checkbox", "input": true, "key": "consentimientoRgpd", "reorder": false, "properties": {}, "customConditional": "", "logic": [], "attributes": {}, "validate": { "required": true, "customMessage": "", "json": "" }, "conditional": { "show": "", "when": "", "json": "" } }, { "label": "Autorizo el uso de imagenes del alumno para actividades escolares", "tableView": true, "alwaysEnabled": false, "type": "checkbox", "input": true, "key": "consentimientoImagenes", "reorder": false, "properties": {}, "customConditional": "", "logic": [], "attributes": {}, "validate": { "required": false, "customMessage": "", "json": "" }, "conditional": { "show": "", "when": "", "json": "" } } ] }, { "type": "button", "label": "Enviar solicitud de matricula", "key": "submit", "theme": "primary", "input": true, "tableView": true } ] }
